user.title: Data Source
user.description:
Choose the alert data source.

**Tzofar** works worldwide with no extra setup.
**Oref Direct** requires a connection from Israel.
**Oref via Proxy** lets you use a proxy server for Oref access outside Israel.

proxy.title: Proxy Configuration
proxy.description: Enter the URL of your Oref API proxy server.

areas.title: Location Filter
areas.description:
Choose how to filter alerts by location:

**Districts** — monitor entire regions (e.g. all of Haifa district).
**Cities** — pick specific cities for precise alerts.

You can use either or both. If cities are selected, only those cities will trigger alerts. Leave both empty for nationwide monitoring.

categories.title: Alert Categories
categories.description: Select which alert categories to monitor. Leave empty for all categories.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the selected data source. Check your network or try a different source.
error.proxy_required: Proxy URL is required when using Oref via Proxy.

init.title: Location Filter
init.description:
**Districts** — monitor entire regions.
